entities.name: ACTN3 TT
entities.context: V's genotype for the ACTN3 gene — homozygous TT, meaning no functional alpha-actinin-3 protein

entities.name: Alpha-actinin-3
entities.context: Protein absent in V due to ACTN3 TT genotype; its absence favors endurance over explosive power

entities.name: Endurance-Oriented Muscle Fiber Type
entities.context: V's genetic predisposition toward sustained aerobic effort rather than explosive/power movements

entities.name: Zone 2 Cardio
entities.context: Low-intensity aerobic training days (Day 3, Day 6, Day 7) where V's body naturally excels due to fiber type

entities.name: Power Movements
entities.context: Explosive exercises like box jumps and medicine ball slams that require more deliberate practice for V

relationships.context: TT genotype means V lacks functional alpha-actinin-3 protein
TT genotype determines endurance-oriented muscle fiber composition
Endurance fiber type means V naturally excels at sustained Zone 2 aerobic work
Endurance orientation means explosive power movements won't come as naturally and need deliberate practice
